description_long: This rifle features a long, metallic barrel with a robust rectangular receiver and a prominent, angular stock at the rear. The body is primarily composed of matte gray and black metal, with a few distinct mechanical components such as a trigger guard, magazine well, and a bolt handle. The stock is fixed and angular, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the barrel is straight and of standard thickness, extending well beyond the receiver. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, partially visible beneath the receiver. A simple iron sight is mounted on top, with no visible optics or advanced sighting systems. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on function over aesthetics.
description: A long, gray and black metallic rifle with a fixed angular stock, standard barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and robust, emphasizing function.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, standard barrel, and visible magazine well.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel alignment, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the angular stock from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's shape and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
